message:
chore: gitignore underscore-prefixed agent temp/target dirs and session exports

Add patterns for ephemeral files created by concurrent coding agents:
- .target_*/ for agent-specific cargo target dirs (e.g. .target_boldmeadow_auth3/)
- .tmp_*/ for agent temp cargo homes and build dirs (e.g. .tmp_cargo_home_codex/)
- tmp_*/ for unprefixed temp dirs (e.g. tmp_copperridge/)
- pi-session-*.html for session export snapshots

The existing .target-*/ and .tmp-*/ patterns only matched dash-separated
names; these additions cover the underscore-separated variants that multiple
concurrent agents produce.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,10 +33,16 @@ tests/ext_conformance/reports/*
 .codex_space_probe
 .tmp-*/
 .tmp-*
+.tmp_*/
 .white_deer_target/
+tmp_*/
 
 # Per-agent cargo target directories
 .target-*/
+.target_*/
+
+# Session export snapshots
+pi-session-*.html
 
 # Patch/merge artifacts
 *.orig
